name: idn-marketplace
description: IDN (Innovative Dynamic Networks) brand & design system for Claude Code.

plugins.name: idn-design
plugins.description: IDN brand system — auto-loads when crafting IDN landing pages, UI, images, or slide decks. Ships brand voice, color/type tokens, fonts, logos, Lucide icons, a WCAG-verified quality rubric, and a high-fidelity React UI kit.
